reviews.comment:
2 hs de espera. Solo fui porque estaba con el tanque vacío. Les recomiendo que vaya a otras estaciones de servicio. Siempre lo mismo, tienen un solo playero... y después cierta hora no les anda el posnet. UNOS CHANTAS LOS DUEÑOS!

(Translated by Google)
Two-hour wait. I only went because my tank was empty. I recommend you go to other gas stations. It's always the same, they only have one attendant... and after a certain hour their card machine stops working. The owners are crooks!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTX29PMFZREAE

reviews.comment:
Un desastre los playeros. 20 minutos de vola con apenas 3 autos. Desastre.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants were a disaster. A 20-minute flight with barely 3 cars. A disaster.
